role: Alleged MOIS officer; operated from Iranian Embassy Vienna
bio: Hamid Naghashan is alleged in Belgian and Austrian intelligence reporting to have operated as a Ministry of Intelligence and Security (MOIS) officer from the Iranian Embassy in Vienna. He has been named in connection with the Assadollah Assadi case — a network of Iranian intelligence activity in Europe. He maintains a low public profile and details remain limited to intelligence and law-enforcement reporting. All connections are alleged.
editorial_notes: Low-profile. All intelligence connections are alleged based on Belgian/Austrian reporting. Do not link to Assadollah Assadi — that entity is being created separately.
